scripts.build:bin:kanna-terminal-recovery: PROFILE="${PROFILE:-debug}"; TARGET="${TARGET:-$(rustc -vV | awk '/^host:/ {print $2}')}"; if [ "$PROFILE" = "release" ]; then OUTDIR="../../.build/${TARGET}/release"; else OUTDIR="../../.build/debug"; fi; mkdir -p "$OUTDIR" && bun x pkg ./dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output "$OUTDIR/kanna-terminal-recovery"
